name: dependabot-reviewer
description: Review, verify, fix, and update Dependabot and ospo-renovate PRs across all GitHub hosts. /dependabot-review approves safe updates and sets automerge. /dependabot-verify reports PR status read-only. /dependabot-fix fixes a single selected PR or broken main-branch CI interactively. /dependabot-update updates all open PR branches and resolves dependency-file merge conflicts autonomously.
